title: Thix
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Thix''' was a security guard in Prince [[Xizor's Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was in charge of securing sector 1138. He was killed when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his friends walked into the subbasement in the search for [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].

==Behind the scenes==
Thix's name and the sector he was securing are clear references to [[George Lucas]]' movie ''THX-1138''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}}
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (abridged audiobook)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' abridged audiobook]]
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (junior novelization)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' junior novelization]]
